about.description: At thearmstronggym, we believe in pushing boundaries. Our premium facility offers everything you need to transform your body and mind in an aesthetic, mood-lit environment.

programs.title: Strength Training
programs.description: Build muscle mass and increase your raw strength with our heavy lifting program.

programs.title: CrossFit
programs.description: High-intensity functional movements designed to push your cardiovascular endurance.

programs.title: Personal Training
programs.description: 1-on-1 coaching customized completely to your unique fitness goals.

programs.title: Yoga & Mobility
programs.description: Improve flexibility, balance, and mental focus with our expert-led yoga sessions.

programs.title: Cardio Fitness
programs.description: Optimized routines using modern cardio equipment to maximize calorie burn.

programs.title: Weight Loss
programs.description: Structured programs integrating workout, nutrition, and recovery for effective results.

videoGallery.title: Beast Mode: Full Body Workout
videoGallery.description: Follow along with Elite Trainer Marcus for a high-intensity full body smash session.

videoGallery.title: Advanced HIIT Cardio
videoGallery.description: Burn maximum calories in minimum time with this intense 20-minute guided cardio routine.

videoGallery.title: Master the Deadlift
videoGallery.description: Learn the perfect form to prevent injury and lift heavier in this detailed tutorial.

videoGallery.title: 10-Minute Core Crunch
videoGallery.description: A quick, equipment-free core routine you can do anywhere to build functional strength.

testimonials.text: "This gym offers a wide variety of modern, well-maintained equipment, including strength and cardio machines, and a good sound system. They highlight the supportive and knowledgeable trainers, and the clean and hygienic environment. They also like the friendly and cooperative atmosphere."
testimonials.name: Nishant Yadav
testimonials.subtitle: Lost 30 lbs, gained confidence

testimonials.text: "I joined THE ARMSTRONG GYM before two months and I can say confidently that it has exceeded my expectations in every way. The gym is equipped with wide range of modern machines that cater to all fitness level irrespective you are at beginner level or an experienced Gym person."
testimonials.name: Nitu Singh
testimonials.subtitle: Strength Athlete

testimonials.text: "Ajay and Rohit bhaiya are the best trainers.... Very cooperative and supportive.... Equipments and machines are top notch and well maintained..... Proper hygeine is maintained and air freshers are used often to remove any type of odours... Best gym I have ever been to 💪 …"
testimonials.name: Rehan Bhati
testimonials.subtitle: Yoga Enthusiast

testimonials.text: "I've recently joined this gym and I'm really impressed🫡🔥The hygiene is top-notch, and they maintain the cleanliness very well. The gym has a great balance of both strength and cardio equipment, all in excellent condition. The machines are modern and well-maintained. Most importantly"
testimonials.name: Ritika
testimonials.subtitle: Personal Training Client
